title: Communauté d'agglomération de Saintes
summary: Communauté d'agglomération de Saintes (since 2023: Saintes - Grandes Rives - L'Agglo) is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Saintes. It is located in the Charente-Maritime department, in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region, southwestern France. Created in 2013, its seat is in Saintes. Its area is 474.6 km2. Its population was 60,110 in 2019, of which 25,287 in Saintes proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération de Saintes (since 2023: Saintes - Grandes Rives - L'Agglo) is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Saintes. It is located in the Charente-Maritime department, in the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region, southwestern France. Created in 2013, its seat is in Saintes. Its area is 474.6 km2. Its population was 60,110 in 2019, of which 25,287 in Saintes proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 36 communes:
